title: rubus × coarctatiflorus subsp. goniophyllus
intro: Rubus × coarctatiflorus subsp. goniophyllus, also known as the Goniophyllous Blackberry Bramble, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, characterized by its thorny stems and dark purple fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rubus × coarctatiflorus subsp. goniophyllus include its potential to boost immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Rubus × coarctatiflorus subsp. goniophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
